topic: Will AI surgeons outperform human surgeons within the next 20 years?

seo_titles: Will AI surgeons outperform human surgeons within the next 20 years?
What Everyone Gets Wrong About Will AI
story_angles: Claim — AI surgeons may outperform human surgeons within the next 20 years.
Evidence — compare surgical robotics, clinical outcomes, training data, and ethical oversight in the operating room.
Verdict — where AI exceeds human performance and where human judgment remains essential.
